mapper.sql: select o.order_id, o.order_no, o.title, o.description, o.category, o.reward_amount, o.location_text, o.creator_id, o.executor_id, o.status, o.version, o.published_at, o.taken_at, o.started_at, o.completed_at, o.cancelled_at, o.cancel_reason, o.del_flag, o.create_by, o.create_time, o.update_by, o.update_time, o.remark, c.nick_name as creator_name, e.nick_name as executor_name from biz_order o left join sys_user c on o.creator_id = c.user_id left join sys_user e on o.executor_id = e.user_id
mapper.update: update biz_order set status = #{status}, published_at = sysdate(), version = version + 1, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where order_id = #{orderId} and creator_id = #{creatorId} and status = 'DRAFT' and del_flag = '0'
